description.from: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals 922*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+532.2% ATK as Physical DMG, knocking them down for 1sec. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing 615*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+344.1% ATK as Physical DMG, knocking them down for 1sec, and increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% for 4sec.
description.to: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals 922(1+0.3Skill Level)+532.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage, knocking them down for 1.8 sec. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest Attack, dealing 615(1+0.3Skill Level)+344.1% of Attack Power as Physical Damage, knocking them down for 1.8 sec, and increasing their Physical Damage taken by 30% for 4 sec.

description.from:
Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for 7sec, increasing ATK by 333*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion Chance by 300.
When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical DMG is increased by 2% for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
description.to:
Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for 10 sec, increasing Attack by 333(1+0.3Skill Level) and Physical Evasion Chance by 350.
When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical Damage is increased by 3% for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.from: Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing 1146*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+716.8% ATK as Physical DMG and stunning them for 1.8sec. This skill gains an additional 800 Physical Defense Penetration.
description.to: Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing 1146(1+0.3Skill Level)+716.8% of Attack Power as Physical Damage and stunning them for 1.8 sec. This skill gains an additional 500 Physical Defense Penetration.

description.from: On Normal Attack, has a 20% chance to deal 488*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+284.4% ATK as additional Physical DMG, stunning the target for 0.5sec, and increasing Physical DMG taken by 15% for 5sec. This skill ignores the target’s damage reduction effects.
description.to:
Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150, and Normal Attacks ignore the target’s damage reduction effects.
On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to deal 488(1+0.3*Skill Level)+284.4% of Attack Power as additional Physical Damage, stunning the target for 0.6 sec and reducing their Physical Defense by 25% for 5 sec.

dark.from: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by 250.
dark.to: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by 400.

dark.from: Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by 20% for 7 sec.
dark.to: Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by 40% for 6 sec.

light.from: Cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec.
light.to: Normal Attack damage is increased by 25%, and the cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec.

dark.from: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for 10 sec and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for 2 sec and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.from: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.
description.to: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 10%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.

dark.from: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by 35 for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
dark.to: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by 30 for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
